skills.name: kindex-prime
skills.title: Kindex Prime
skills.description: Load relevant context from the Kindex knowledge graph at session start. Orients Claude with project knowledge, active constraints, and watches.

skills.name: kindex-capture
skills.title: Kindex Capture
skills.description: Capture a specific piece of knowledge, constraint, or decision to the Kindex knowledge graph. Use when the user says 'remember this' or 'add this to kindex'.

skills.name: kindex-learn
skills.title: Kindex Learn
skills.description: Extract knowledge from the current conversation and add it to the Kindex graph. Use at session end or after producing valuable discoveries.
